task_objective: Professional Nail Art Line Art Generation & High-Precision Press-On Nail Design Editing

structural_reference.description: High-precision preservation of nail structural framework, including exact nail shape silhouette (square, round, almond, stiletto, coffin), length-to-width ratio, edge contours, and overall nail profile

aesthetic_reference.description: Extract high-end aesthetic elements, including color palette, material texture (matte, glossy, metallic), pattern or detailing, and overall style tone

model_reference.description: Hand model reference - supports Asian model (lighter skin tone with Asian characteristics), European model (medium skin tone with Caucasian characteristics), African model (darker skin tone with African characteristics), including hand anatomy, finger proportions, knuckle definition, and skin texture. Priority rule: if Figure 2 contains a model's hand or face, prioritize using the model's hand and face from Figure 2 over this reference

workflow.step_1_structural_analysis: Parse structural elements from Figure 1 with strict precision, including nail silhouette lines, shape geometry, proportional relationships, edge details, and profile contours.
workflow.step_2_aesthetic_extraction: Extract color palette, material texture, pattern or detailing, and overall style elements from Figure 2, to be applied exclusively to the nail structure from Figure 1.
workflow.step_3_composite_generation: Generate the nail art design by precisely applying aesthetic elements from Figure 2 onto the nail structure from Figure 1. Ensure seamless integration with no visible artifacts, physically accurate material rendering, and natural aesthetic fit. Preserve complete structural integrity from Figure 1 while incorporating color system, material texture, and style elements from Figure 2.

FINAL_OUTPUT.description: Professional nail art fashion photography composite presentation in 2x2 grid layout
FINAL_OUTPUT.grid_1: Nail alone without finger, clean soft grey background, strictly preserve the exact nail shape, quantity, and position from Figure 1 line art with zero deviation, showcasing complete nail structure, silhouette, and aesthetic details
FINAL_OUTPUT.grid_2: Back of hand close-up - press-on nail worn on hand, emphasizing nail art design on the dorsal hand view with natural hand posture. Prioritize model hand from Figure 2 if present, otherwise use model_reference hand parameters with corresponding skin tone characteristics
FINAL_OUTPUT.grid_3: Fist clench close-up - hand in gentle fist position, showcasing nail art design from a dynamic angle with visible nail tips and surface details. Prioritize model hand from Figure 2 if present, otherwise use model_reference hand parameters
FINAL_OUTPUT.grid_4: Face-framing close-up - hand with press-on nails held up near the model's face, capturing the nail art in intimate proximity with facial features. Prioritize model face and hand from Figure 2 if present, otherwise use model_reference hand parameters
FINAL_OUTPUT.consistency_requirements: Preserve the complete structural integrity from Figure 1 — nail shape, proportions, and silhouette remain untouched across all variations. When model_reference hand parameters are applied, maintain consistent hand anatomy, skin tone characteristics, and natural hand-nail interaction. Guarantee identical nail art design (color, pattern, texture, material) across all four grid variations.
